title: pseudocalyx ochraceus
intro: Pseudocalyx ochraceus, also known as the Orange Flower Pseudocalyx, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Pseudocalyx ochraceus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Pseudocalyx ochraceus is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in capsule or tincture form for its medicinal properties.
